classifications.phrase: higher interest rates are working to establish a more sustainable balance
inflation is still too high and will remain so for some time yet
Boards priority is to return inflation to target within a reasonable timeframe
Board remains alert to the risk that expectations of ongoing high inflation
Some further tightening of monetary policy may be required to ensure that inflation returns to…
Growth in the Australian economy has slowed
conditions in the labour market have eased

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a hawkish stance on inflation control while acknowledging growth and employment softening, maintaining a hold to assess impacts while reserving the option for further tightening.
